title: Filipino Chicken Adobo
description: Classic Filipino dish made with marinated chicken cooked in a mixture of vinegar, soy sauce, garlic, and bay leaves. Rich, savory, and slightly sweet.
instructions: Marinate the chicken in vinegar, soy sauce, garlic, and bay leaves for at least 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat. Remove chicken from marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
